title_sr: Paramedic Care 018 - Vaš partner u zdravlju
content_sr: Paramedic Care 018 je vodeća kompanija za medicinski transport i hitnu pomoć u Srbiji. Sa sedištem u Nišu, pružamo profesionalne usluge širom zemlje.
content_en: Paramedic Care 018 is a leading medical transport and emergency services company in Serbia. Based in Niš, we provide professional services throughout the country.

content_sr: Pružiti najkvalitetniju medicinsku negu i transport, osiguravajući bezbednost i udobnost svakog pacijenta. Verujemo da svaka osoba zaslužuje pristup profesionalnoj medicinskoj pomoći, bez obzira na okolnosti.
content_en: To provide the highest quality medical care and transport, ensuring the safety and comfort of every patient. We believe that every person deserves access to professional medical assistance, regardless of circumstances.

content_sr: Najviši standardi u svemu što radimo
content_en: Highest standards in everything we do

content_sr: Možete se osloniti na nas
content_en: You can count on us

content_sr: Razumemo vaše potrebe
content_en: We understand your needs

content_sr: Uvek tu kada vam zatrebamo
content_en: Always there when you need us

content_sr: Logo i brend identitet u zaglavlju sajta
content_en: Logo and brand identity in the site header

content_sr:
Naš proces obuhvata:

· Detaljna medicinska procena: Analiza zdravstvenog stanja, stabilnosti i specifičnih potreba pacijenta.
· Procena rizika: Identifikacija potencijalnih izazova tokom transporta i planiranje mera za njihovo prevazilaženje.
· Izbor optimalnog načina transporta: Organizacija drumskog ili vazdušnog transporta, u zavisnosti od stanja pacijenta i udaljenosti do odredišta.
· Koordinacija sa institucijama: Direktna komunikacija sa bolnicama i klinikama kako bi se obezbedio kontinuirani protok informacija i nesmetan prijem.
content_en:
Our process includes:

· Detailed medical evaluation: Analysis of the patient's health status, stability and specific needs.
· Risk assessment: Identification of potential challenges during transport and planning of measures to overcome them.
· Choosing the optimal mode of transport: Organization of road or air transport, depending on the patient's condition and the distance to the destination.
· Coordination with institutions: Direct communication with hospitals and clinics to ensure a continuous flow of information and smooth reception.

content_sr: Pružamo širok spektar medicinskih usluga prilagođenih vašim potrebama
content_en: We provide a wide range of medical services tailored to your needs

content_sr: Zakažite medicinski transport brzo i jednostavno. Naš tim je spreman da vam pomogne.
content_en: Book medical transport quickly and easily. Our team is ready to help you.

content_sr: Pružamo vrhunsku medicinsku negu sa fokusom na bezbednost i udobnost pacijenata. Naš tim je dostupan 24 sata dnevno, 7 dana u nedelji.
content_en: We provide top-quality medical care with a focus on patient safety and comfort. Our team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

content_sr: Brza i profesionalna medicinska pomoć dostupna 24/7. Naš tim je obučen za sve vrste hitnih situacija.
content_en: Fast and professional emergency medical assistance available 24/7. Our team is trained for all types of emergencies.

content_sr: Pružamo kompletnu medicinsku negu prilagođenu vašim potrebama
content_en: We provide complete medical care tailored to your needs

content_sr: Usluge naših sestara in lekara dostupne su Vam u našoj ambulant, u vašem domu i na terenu.
content_en: The services of our nurses and doctors are available to you in our clinic, in your home and in the field.

content_sr: Tim stručnih lekara i medicinskih sestara sa višegodišnjim iskustvom.
content_en: Team of professional doctors and nurses with years of experience in medicine.

content_sr: Naš medicinski tim čine iskusni profesionalci koji su posvećeni pružanju najbolje moguće nege. Svaki član tima prolazi redovne obuke.
content_en: Our medical team consists of experienced professionals dedicated to providing the best possible care. Each team member undergoes regular training.

content_sr: Naš tim je spreman da vam pomogne. Kontaktirajte nas danas.
content_en: Our team is ready to help you. Contact us today.

content_sr:
Naš proces uključuje:

· Detaljnu medicinsku evaluaciju: Analiza zdravstvenog stanja, stabilnosti i specifičnih potreba pacijenta.
· Procenu rizika: Identifikacija potencijalnih izazova tokom transporta i planiranje mera za njihovo prevazilaženje.
· Izbor optimalnog načina transporta: Organizacija drumskog,ili vazdušnog  transporta, u zavisnosti od stanja pacijenta i udaljenosti destinacije.
· Koordinaciju sa ustanovama: Direktna komunikacija sa bolnicama i klinikama kako bi se obezbedio neprekidan tok informacija i nesmetan prijem.
content_en:
Our process includes:

· Detailed medical evaluation: Analysis of the patient's health status, stability and specific needs.
· Risk assessment: Identification of potential challenges during transport and planning of measures to overcome them.
· Choosing the optimal mode of transport: Organization of road or air transport, depending on the patient's condition and the distance to the destination.
· Coordination with institutions: Direct communication with hospitals and clinics to ensure a continuous flow of information and smooth reception.

description_en: Booking phone number next to "Book Transport" button
description_sr: Telefon za rezervacije pored dugmeta "Zakažite Transport"

content_sr: Odaberite vrstu transporta koja vam najviše odgovara
content_en: Choose the type of transport that suits you best

content_sr: Siguran i udoban transport specijalizovanim sanitetskim vozilom opremljenim najmodernijom medicinskom opremom.
content_en: Safe and comfortable transport with a specialised ambulance vehicle equipped with the most modern medical equipment.

content_sr: Profesionalan transport pacijenata između zdravstvenih ustanova sa punom medicinskom pratnjom.
content_en: Professional patient transport between healthcare facilities with full medical escort.

content_sr: Bezbedna vožnja od vašeg doma do zdravstvene ustanove. Preuzimamo pacijenta na adresi i pratimo do destinacije.
content_en: Safe journey from your home to the healthcare facility. We pick up the patient at the address and escort to the destination.
features_sr: Pomoć pri ukrcavanju|Udoban transport|Pratnja do prijema

content_sr: Naša flota sanitetskih vozila je opremljena najmodernijom medicinskom opremom. Sva vozila su klimatizovana i redovno servisirana.
content_en: Our ambulance fleet is equipped with the most modern medical equipment. All vehicles are air-conditioned and regularly serviced.
description_sr: Sekcija o floti vozila sa slikom

content_sr: Jednostavno zakažite medicinski transport putem naše online forme ili nas pozovite direktno.
content_en: Easily book medical transport through our online form or call us directly.
